creator: estartu@ze.tum.de
text:
I have geom label loaded and insert a cd/dvd in the drive.
geom_label generates an label for this disk. 
GEOM_LABEL: Label for provider acd0t01 is iso9660/VHS_AGBLAND_081.

Sofar it's ok, but this label isn't removed when I eject the cdrom and
after i insert a new cd/dvd no new label is generated.

Fix: 

n/k
How-To-Repeat: Insert a cd/dvd with geom label loaded.
